default_music_style_prompt: dark emotional pop rock, moody piano, muted electric guitar, deep bass, cinematic drums, low ambient pad, restrained intense vocal

suno_advanced_settings.reason_th: Public beta preset values are controlled and safe for consistent creator output.

writing_rules: Thai lyrics must sound natural and conversational
Hook must be short, emotional, catchy, and caption-friendly
Do not reference real artists or copyrighted artist styles
Instrument and production tags inside parentheses must be English only
Final Chorus should feel stronger than previous chorus

section_instrument_tags.Intro: dark piano, low ambient pad, tense atmosphere
section_instrument_tags.Verse 1: gentle guitar, warm bass, intimate vocal
section_instrument_tags.Pre-Chorus: drums build softly, rising emotional tension
section_instrument_tags.Chorus: dark full band chorus, deep bass, cinematic drums
section_instrument_tags.Verse 2: rhythmic guitar and bass, steady groove
section_instrument_tags.Final Chorus: bigger drums, layered backing vocals, expanded emotion
section_instrument_tags.Outro: soft fade out, lingering piano and guitar
